examples: They lay on the firm sands, listening to the plaintive cry of the seagulls.
Wendy was now almost overhead, and they could hear her plaintive cry.
Hark to the plaintive song of the old woman, to the call of the priests!
Lang watched a while and seemed moved by the children and their plaintive song.
Emmanuel, the African, pens plaintive letters full of unintentional doubles entendres to his lost sister.
